targets.expr: sum(count_over_time({service=~"$service", environment=~"$environment"} | json | event="http.response" | status >= 500 | __error__="" [$__interval])) / sum(count_over_time({service=~"$service", environment=~"$environment"} | json | event="http.response" | __error__="" [$__interval]))
quantile_over_time(0.95, {service=~"$service", environment=~"$environment"} | json | event="http.response" | unwrap duration_ms | __error__="" [$__interval])
topk(10, sum by (pathname) (count_over_time({service=~"$service", environment=~"$environment"} | json | event="http.response" | slow_response="true" | pathname != "" | __error__="" [$__range])))
sum(count_over_time({service=~"$service", environment=~"$environment"} | json | event="client.log" | source="browser" | slowLoad="true" | __error__="" [$__interval]))
avg(avg_over_time({service=~"$service", environment=~"$environment"} | json | event="client.log" | source="browser" | slowLoad="true" | unwrap durationMs | __error__="" [$__interval]))
sum(count_over_time({service=~"$service", environment=~"$environment"} | json | event="client.log" | source="browser" | clientPageError="true" | __error__="" [$__interval]))

topk(10, sum by (pathname, type) (count_over_time({service=~"$service", environment=~"$environment"} | json | event="client.log" | source="browser" | slowLoad="true" | pathname != "" | __error__="" [$__range])))

{service=~"$service", environment=~"$environment"} | json | event="client.log" | source="browser" | (clientPageError="true" or level="error") | __error__="" | line_format "{{.pathname}} | {{.errorMessage}} | {{.message}}"
count(sum by (user_id) (count_over_time({service=~"$service", environment=~"$environment"} | json | event="user.active" | user_id != "" | __error__="" [24h])))

100 - ((node_filesystem_avail_bytes{job="$job", instance=~"$instance", mountpoint="/", fstype!="rootfs"} * 100) / node_filesystem_size_bytes{job="$job", instance=~"$instance", mountpoint="/", fstype!="rootfs"})
